ShortDescription.Value: One place for all your notifications across the city!

Publish.LongDescription:
### What does this mod do?
- Mod collects all notifications from around the city and places it into one UI - Mod provides counter per notification type - Clicking on each group of notification type, it gives the user an individual Notification below it - By clicking on individual notification the user will get information about entity and user's camera will jump to location
### Support and feedback
Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like effort put into free mods, please give a Like :)
Support provided to on [Cities: Skylines Modding > Notification Looker](https://discord.com/channels/1024242828114673724/1518263146333339838)
### Credits - Necko1996 - author/maintainer - Thanks to rcav8tr - partialy used his UI code - Thanks to krzychu124 - code review, suggestions and explaining how CS2 works - Thanks to River-mochi - testing and UI idea
Publish.ChangeLog:
## v1.1.0
- Improvement on how mod gets data - New Feature! - Mod now remembers open or closed state, and remembers position of panel. - Fixed UI warrnings - Slight performance improvement on UI side
